name: com.ediveplus.objimporter
description:
Runtime/editor Wavefront OBJ + MTL importer with built-in BMP/TGA/JPG/PNG/DDS/CRN texture loading. Materials are created against the URP Lit shader. Fork of Dummiesman's importer.

Note: in Player builds, add 'Universal Render Pipeline/Lit' to Always Included Shaders (Project Settings > Graphics).

samples.description: Example MonoBehaviours and scenes that load an OBJ from a file path or stream at runtime.
